body_txt: When confronted with some evidence of her wrongdoing or in need of an excuse to get out of something, Alice blurts out all the things she can think of that could justify it. Unfortunately, they all contradict each other . Some might even be downright implausible . She probably would have been better off sticking to just one of them. I was going to write a longer description, but I had to shut the computer down due to a thunderstorm, there was a hole in the roof already so I went stargazing, I needed to run to the gas station and then get my car from the repair shop, and meanwhile had to stop the basement flooding.
